title: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 — reference Annex A themes (Tron built-in, not certification)
disclaimer: Annex-A style prompts for secure engineering. Not an ISO certification audit.

themes.summary: Privileged access rights — admin paths, elevation, break-glass patterns in software.
Logging — centralised logging, log injection, sensitive data in logs.
Application security requirements — input validation, secure defaults, dependency risk.
